notes: Realistic trigger prompts + assertions. The collector is deterministic and fast; the semantic pass produces insights.json against references/insight-schema.json; the report is a self-contained HTML Artifact + markdown mirror.

cases.name: default-week
cases.prompt: 帮我做一下这周的 Personal Review
assert: runs collector with --range week (default), reads stats.json + corpus.jsonl
produces insights.json valid against references/insight-schema.json (all 10 required sections present)
rhythm.by_day and rhythm.by_hour are copied verbatim from stats.json (not recomputed)
publishes a self-contained HTML Artifact (no external asset/CDN refs) and writes a markdown mirror
tool_scene section omitted because the current week is v2-only (stats.tool_scene.available=false)

cases.name: tool-scene-present-oldrange
cases.prompt: 分析我 5 月中旬那一周的 typeless 记录，给我个人复盘
assert: collector run with --since/--until covering mid-May (history table)
stats.tool_scene.available=true; insights.json includes a tool_scene object with apps (Desktop App / Ghostty / Chrome ...) copied from stats.json
report renders the 工具/场景分布 section

cases.name: small-sample-alignment
cases.prompt: 先用一小部分数据（40 条）跑一遍 personal review，让我确认最终 output 的样子
assert: full pipeline completes on ~40 records: insights.json + report.html + report.md
used to lock report shape before a full run

cases.name: full-corpus
cases.prompt: 把我全部 typeless 记录都分析一遍，做一个总的复盘
assert: collector run with --range all (both tables, ~1300 usable records)
corpus read in day-chunks if large; insights synthesized across the whole span
tool_scene present (old table contributes app context)

cases.name: empty-range-graceful
cases.prompt: 给我看看 6 月 10 号到 6 月 20 号那段的复盘
assert: collector exits 4 (zero usable records in that gap between the two tables)
skill explains there is no data in that range instead of fabricating a report

cases.name: missing-db-loud
assert: collector --validate or run exits 2 (DB not found)
skill reports the DB path issue clearly and does not emit an empty report
